rationale: Section 31.05 governs early-payment tax discounts by taxing units. The proposed increase to the homestead exemption amount under §11.13(b) does not alter, reference, or interact with the discount mechanics in this section.
quote: The governing body of a taxing unit may adopt the discounts provided by Subsection (b) or Subsection (c), or both, in the manner required by law for official action by the body.
_note: No conflict. §31.05 addresses payment discounts; proposed change to §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount is unrelated.
